content: Hi, I'm Spencer, nice to meet you. I'm a veterinarian at a rural practice, and I'm looking for some new recipes to try out in the kitchen. Do you have any recommendations for a good cookbook?
Nice to meet you too, Spencer! I'd be happy to help you with that. There's a great cookbook called 'The Joy of Cooking' that has a lot of classic recipes.
That sounds great, thanks! I love trying out new recipes. I've actually been trying to perfect my own chicken soup recipe, which is a bit tricky, but I'm getting the hang of it.
That's impressive! Making chicken soup from scratch can be a bit of an art form. What kind of ingredients do you like to use?

I'm a big fan of using fresh vegetables and herbs from my garden. I've been trying to grow more of my own food lately, which is a bit challenging, but it's definitely rewarding. I've been listening to a lot of podcasts about gardening and cooking, which has been really helpful.
That's really cool. It's great that you're trying to grow your own food. What kind of podcasts do you like to listen to?

I'm a big fan of 'The Splendid Table' and 'How I Built This'. They're both really interesting and informative. And I've been trying to get into knitting, which is a great way to relax after a long day of work.
That's great! Knitting can be really therapeutic. What kind of things do you like to knit?
I'm actually making a scarf for my sister's birthday, which is on March 22nd. I'm hoping to finish it by then, but I'm not sure if I'll have enough time.
That's a great gift! I'm sure your sister will love it. Do you have a favorite type of yarn to work with?
Yeah, I do! I love working with wool yarn, it's so soft and cozy. And I've been trying to get into board games, which is a great way to spend time with friends and family.
That's great! Board games can be a lot of fun. What kind of games do you like to play?

I'm a big fan of 'Settlers of Catan' and 'Carcassonne'. They're both really strategic and challenging. And I've been trying to get into podcast listening, which is a great way to learn new things and relax.
That's really cool. It's great that you're trying to learn new things and relax. What kind of podcasts do you like to listen to?
I'm a big fan of true crime podcasts, they're so fascinating. And I've been trying to get into cooking more, which is a bit challenging, but it's definitely rewarding.
That's great! Cooking can be a lot of fun. What kind of dishes do you like to make?
I'm a big fan of making soups and stews, they're so comforting. And I've been trying to get into baking, which is a great way to relax and be creative.
That's really cool. Baking can be a lot of fun. What kind of things do you like to bake?
I'm actually making a cake for my niece's birthday, which is on April 10th. I'm hoping to finish it by then, but I'm not sure if I'll have enough time.
That's a great gift! I'm sure your niece will love it. Do you have a favorite type of cake to make?
Yeah, I do! I love making chocolate cake, it's so rich and decadent. And I've been trying to get into gardening, which is a great way to relax and be outdoors.
That's great! Gardening can be really therapeutic. What kind of things do you like to grow?

I'm actually growing a lot of vegetables and herbs, which is a bit challenging, but it's definitely rewarding. I've been trying to get into composting, which is a great way to reduce waste and help the environment.
That's really cool. Composting can be a great way to reduce waste and help the environment. Do you have a favorite type of vegetable to grow?
Yeah, I do! I love growing tomatoes, they're so delicious and easy to grow. And I've been trying to get into cooking more, which is a bit challenging, but it's definitely rewarding.
That's great! Cooking can be a lot of fun. What kind of dishes do you like to make?
I'm a big fan of making pasta dishes, they're so versatile and delicious. And I've been trying to get into food preservation, which is a great way to save money and eat healthy.
That's really cool. Food preservation can be a great way to save money and eat healthy. Do you have a favorite type of food to preserve?
Yeah, I do! I love preserving jam and jelly, it's so easy and delicious. And I've been trying to get into canning, which is a great way to save money and eat healthy.
That's great! Canning can be a great way to save money and eat healthy. Do you have a favorite type of food to can?
Yeah, I do! I love canning vegetables and soups, they're so convenient and delicious. And I've been trying to get into dehydrating, which is a great way to save money and eat healthy.
That's really cool. Dehydrating can be a great way to save money and eat healthy. Do you have a favorite type of food to dehydrate?
Yeah, I do! I love dehydrating fruits and vegetables, they're so easy to store and eat. And I've been trying to get into cooking more, which is a bit challenging, but it's definitely rewarding.
That's great! Cooking can be a lot of fun. What kind of dishes do you like to make?
